title: Kenyan Fritters
description: A classic Kenyan snack, these fritters are crispy on the outside and gooey on the inside.

ingredients.name: 1 cup all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: can be substituted with whole wheat flour

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup shortening
ingredients.notes: can be replaced with vegetable oil

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup gooey
ingredients.notes: adjust to desired level of gooeyness

instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
In a large bowl, whisk together flour, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and buttermilk.
Add gooey and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Gradually add dry ingredients to wet ingredients and mix until just combined.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the hot oil.
Fry fritters until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Using a slotted spoon, remove fritters from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate.
